title: Freshly Steamed Filipino Rhubarb Stir-fry
description: This crisp and indulgent dish features fresh rhubarb in a light steaming process with a sprinkle of aromatic herbs for a delightful twist on classic Filipino flavors.
instructions: Wash and thinly slice the rhubarb.
Mince the garlic, green onions (including some white part), shallots, and dried galangal if using.
In a wok or large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add minced ingredients and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until fragrant.
Add sliced rhubarb to the wok and stir gently for another minute.
Drizzle lime juice over the stir-fried mixture and mix well.
Serve immediately with additional slices of green onions on top.
